description: Style NoteCrafted from soft cotton and designed with a cut that offers a flattering silhouette, these pair of trousers from basics makes a great addition to your semi-formal wardrobe. Pair it with semi-formal shirts, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes.Product DetailsDark brown trousers, has two pockets on the sides with two patch pockets at the back with buttoned closures, belt loops on waistband and a zipped and button closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like colours using mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
